# ctyun_mysql_databases (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10033813/10140487



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}


data "ctyun_mysql_databases" "example" {
  instance_id = "2619a9e7300348809f4dbb2e7ead6cc0"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) MySQL实例ID

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) 项目ID
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，默认使用provider配置

### Read-Only

- `databases` (Attributes List) MySQL数据库列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--databases))

<a id="nestedatt--databases"></a>
### Nested Schema for `databases`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) 数据库名称
- `user_vo_list` (Attributes List) 数据库用户权限列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--databases--user_vo_list))

<a id="nestedatt--databases--user_vo_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `databases.user_vo_list`

Read-Only:

- `account_name` (String) 数据库账号名称
- `insert_priv` (Boolean) INSERT权限
- `read_only` (Boolean) 是否只读权限
- `select_priv` (Boolean) SELECT权限
